minimal_theory.source:
theory TamarinRuntimeSmoke
begin

builtins: hashing

rule Runtime_Smoke:
  [ Fr(~x) ]
  --[ RuntimeReady(~x) ]->
  [ Out(h(~x)) ]

lemma runtime_smoke_exists:
  exists-trace
  "Ex x #i. RuntimeReady(x) @ i"

end
